view.title: Tiketi {id}
view.subject: Autu
view.allowServerAccess: Fa'atagaina InterServer e suia le server:
view.emailDisabled: Ua taofia lau imeli ({email}). Faamolemole fesootai
view.ipHelpText: Afai e sau le fesootaiga mai se tuatusi IP eseese. Faamolemole suia.
view.passwordEncrypted: E teu upu fa'aoga i se faleteuoloa fa'ailoga eseese.
view.ticketClosed: Ua tapuni le tiketi lenei, o lea ua taofia tali. Afai e te manaʻa ni isi fesoasoani, e mafai ona e tatala se tiketi fou ma o le a matou fiafia e fesoasoani.
view.replyHint: O le tatala o tiketi eseese mo faʼafitauli fou e fesoasoani i la matou 'au e faʼatauaina ma foʼia vave.
view.userLikedReply: Na fiafia le tagata fa'aaoga i lau tali
view.userDislikedReply: Na le fiafia le tagata fa'aaoga i lau tali
view.closeConfirmText: E te manaʻa e tapuni le tiketi lenei?

new.title: Tiketi Fou
new.subject: Autu
new.subjectValidation: Faamolemole ulufale se fa'amatalaga pupuu o le fa'afitauli.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Fa'afetai mo lou fesoasoani e fa'atumauina le fa'asologa o le lagolago e ala i le tu'uina atu o se talosaga e tasi i tiketi taitasi.
new.descriptionValidation: Faamolemole ulufale se fa'amatalaga loloto o le fa'afitauli.
new.fileNote: Fa'aaliga: E fa'atagaina na'o faila ata - ituaiga gif/jpeg/png.
new.allowAccessLabel: Ou te fa'atagaina InterServer e ulufale i la'u sava ma faia suiga
new.accessNote: Faamolemole manatua: E ala i le tatala o se talosaga lagolago InterServer atonu e manaʻa ona ulufale, suia, poʼo suia faila i lau faʼaaogaina. E manaʼomia lenei manaʼoga e avatu ai fesoasoani faʼatekinisi. Faamolemole faʼaauau pe a e malilie.
